selection_source.rule: Continue with the strongest useful-density 2024 PASS rows remaining after Waves 2-5. Exclude incumbent sleeves, candidates already falsified on the same symbol by fresher full-history evidence, known portfolio rejects, and the M1 candidate whose full-history runtime would block a terminal before higher-priority H1/M15 tests complete.

ordered_candidates.note: Different FX symbol/mechanism from the index-gold core and a higher-priority decorrelation test than another USDJPY sleeve.
Intraday density candidate; retained despite NDX concentration because its M15 mechanism differs from incumbent index sleeves.
Last unrefreshed full-2024 gold row above the archive 1.20 floor; current XAU rollover is expected to be the binding test.

portfolio_contract.development_survivor_rule: A fixed candidate representation and weight must improve both threshold and adverse preholdout pass rates.
portfolio_contract.sealed_holdout_open_rule: Open once only for a frozen development survivor.
